# Sal's Painting & Basic Renovations
> Residential painting contractor serving Carteret, NJ and Middlesex County. Interior painting, exterior painting, drywall repair, deck staining, trim and door painting, accent walls, and basic renovations. Available 7 days a week, 7AM–9PM. Free estimates.

## Contact
- Website: https://salspaintingrenovation.com/
- Phone: +1-727-644-7674
- Text: +1-727-644-7674
- Email: sal@salspaintingrenovation.com
- Address: 54 Charles St, Carteret, NJ 07008
- Service Area: Middlesex County, NJ (roughly 25-mile radius from Carteret)
- Hours: Monday–Sunday 7AM–9PM

## Business Details
- Legal Name: Sal's Painting & Basic Renovations
- State: New Jersey
- Specialization: Residential painting contractor
- Google Rating: 5.0 stars (14 reviews)
- Founded: 2015
- Google Business Profile: https://share.google/WfeqOL0v1ni1DC3Mh
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/SalsPaintingNJ
